name: Spicy Garlic Fish Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb White fish fillets (sole, whiting, cod, monkfish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any skin and bones from the fish, rinse thoroughly, and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Cut the fish into large chunks.
3. In a bowl, mix together the ground cumin, coriander, anise seeds, chile powder, garlic, lemon juice, and salt until you have a smooth paste.
4. Spread the mixture evenly over the fish pieces, covering them completely. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a deep pan or deep-fryer to 350°F (175°C). Ensure the oil is hot enough that a small bread cube browns in about 50 seconds.
6. Carefully add the fish pieces to the hot oil, cooking them in batches of 2-3 minutes until they are golden brown.
7. Remove the cooked fish with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Serve the fish hot, garnished with lettuce leaves and sliced radishes.
